members.label: wall feature
members.long_form_open_description: White-painted baseboard molding runs along the bottom of the walls; approximately 3-4 inches high, consistent around the entry perimeter and contrasts with wood floor.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: runs under the painting along the right wall and continues to the back wall under the window and door

members.label: wall feature
members.long_form_open_description: White baseboard trim runs along the bottom of both side walls where they meet the wood floor. The trim is around 10 cm tall, painted white, and contrasts with the beige wall color.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Borders the floor along both left and right walls, visible in the foreground and continuing down the hallway toward the distant table.
